raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of box_1 and its left and right sides are accessible; there is enough lateral clearance on both sides to allow both end-effectors to establish a stable pinch/support grip without colliding with box_1 or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly so it no longer blocks the top side of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (clear area to the right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held off of box_1 and a stable, obstacle-free placement region on the table to the right of box_1 is available.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released; box_1 top side becomes accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 left and right sides are accessible, box_2 has been removed from its top, and there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to contact box_1 without obstruction from other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box (box_1) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1 and its left and right sides are accessible; there is enough lateral clearance on both sides to allow both end-effectors to establish a stable pinch/support grip without colliding with box_1 or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly so it no longer blocks the top side of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table (clear area to the right of box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held off of box_1 and a stable, obstacle-free placement region on the table to the right of box_1 is available.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released; box_1 top side becomes accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 left and right sides are accessible, box_2 has been removed from its top, and there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to contact box_1 without obstruction from other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box (box_1) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted clear of the table.
